Hero.title: The <highlight>Programmable</highlight> Charting Engine for Financial <highlight>Time Series</highlight>
Hero.description: Experience the industry's first truly programmable time-series visualization engine. Built specifically for the financial sector, it empowers you to write custom indicators, analyze massive datasets, and build dynamic trading logic—all within a high-performance charting environment.

Features.title: Engineered for Programmable Time-Series Analysis
Features.subtitle: Move beyond static charts. Integrate logic, data, and visualization into a single, powerful workflow.
Features.plugAndPlayDesc: Unleash the full power of our built-in DSL. Write scripts to compute custom metrics, overlay complex indicators, and conditionally draw shapes or text, giving you complete control over your analysis.
Features.dataDrivenDesc: Native support for tick, second, minute, and daily data. Our engine handles real-time streaming, historical backfills, and data gaps with seamless precision for any time-series dataset.
Features.lowMemoryDesc: Advanced downsampling and data serialization techniques reduce memory usage by up to 70%, enabling smooth interaction with millions of historical data points.
Features.professionalChartsDesc: A complete suite of chart types including Candlestick, OHLC, and Heikin-Ashi. Perfect for equities, forex, crypto, and any financial instrument.
Features.multiPlatformDesc: Fully responsive design ensures a flawless experience from desktop workstations to mobile devices. Touch-optimized controls for on-the-go analysis.
Features.highExtensibilityDesc: Extend every layer of the engine. Create custom drawing tools, integrate proprietary indicators, and design unique visual themes using our comprehensive public API.

Benchmark.title: Benchmark Tests
Benchmark.subtitle: Performance in real financial data scenarios, exceeding industry standards
Benchmark.metricsDescription: Support WebSocket real-time data streams, millisecond updates, smooth rendering. Built-in intelligent data aggregation for stable high-frequency data scenarios.

TimeShowcase.title: Global Time Coverage & Timeframes
TimeShowcase.subtitle: Comprehensive timezone support and flexible timeframe options for global financial analysis
TimeShowcase.timezoneFeatures: All timezones support automatic daylight saving time adjustments and real-time synchronization.
TimeShowcase.timeframeFeatures: Support quick switching, custom timeframe combinations, and multi-timeframe analysis.
TimeShowcase.globalCoverageDesc: Support for 20+ major timezones worldwide, covering all major financial markets and trading sessions.
TimeShowcase.multiTimeframeDesc: 24 levels of timeframes from seconds to months, supporting comprehensive multi-timeframe technical analysis.
TimeShowcase.realTimeSyncDesc: Automatic timezone conversion and daylight saving time adjustments for accurate time series data synchronization.

ChartShowcase.title: Rich Chart Types & Tools
ChartShowcase.subtitle: Comprehensive technical indicators and drawing tools for professional time series analysis
ChartShowcase.basicChartsDesc: Professional financial charts for various time series analysis needs
ChartShowcase.lineChartDesc: Real-time line charts with precise data updates
ChartShowcase.areaChartDesc: Stacked area charts for trend analysis
ChartShowcase.mountainChartDesc: Filled area chart for trend visualization
ChartShowcase.highLowChartDesc: High and low price range chart
ChartShowcase.candlestickDesc: Professional-level candlestick charts with multiple technical indicators overlay support.
ChartShowcase.barDesc: Volume and comparison analysis with dynamic scaling.
ChartShowcase.pieDesc: Proportional analysis and portfolio breakdown visualization.
ChartShowcase.heatmapDesc: Big data heat maps to discover hidden data patterns.
ChartShowcase.indicatorFeatures: All indicators support real-time calculation, custom parameter adjustment, and multi-timeframe switching.
ChartShowcase.toolFeatures: All drawing tools support real-time dragging, style customization, and group management.
ChartShowcase.realTimeCalculationDesc: All technical indicators support real-time calculation with millisecond updates for timely time series data analysis.
ChartShowcase.smartInteractionDesc: Drawing tools feature intelligent snapping, auto-alignment, and history tracking for a smooth user experience.
ChartShowcase.highCustomizationDesc: Support custom indicator formulas, drawing tool styles, and shortcut configurations to meet personalized needs.

CTASection.title: Ready to build programmable time-series applications?
CTASection.subtitle: Join the community of developers and financial engineers who are redefining data visualization with CandleView.

Footer.description: The first programmable, high-performance charting engine for financial time-series data. Built for developers, by developers.
